content_body:
December 2021 ~ Five Floridians loved Blue Ridge ! From hour long shuffleboard contests, hot tubbing, and sunsets to gorging on rum cakes from Rum Cake Lady and olive oils from Blue Ridge Olive Oil Co., our family loved our beautiful cabin and our views.

This cabin was so clean and had everything we needed. Can't wait for our return visit!
title: Five Floridians Love Blue Ridge
